<> $string = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $string = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", "http://yahoo.com/abc1", $string); echo $string; This code replaces the URL `http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1` with `http://yahoo.com/abc1` in the given string. The replacement is done using the `str_replace` function, which works for repeated strings as well. Here is a palindrome in the response: **"A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"**
